title: Tyrant (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tyrant''' may refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Tyrant]]''''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Tyrant (Harrower-class)|'''''Tyrant''''']], a [[Harrower-class dreadnought|''Harrower''-class dreadnought]]
*[[Tyrant (escort carrier)|'''''Tyrant''''']], a [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]]
*[[Rebel Dream|'''''Tyrant''''']], an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] later renamed ''Rebel Dream''
*'''[[The Tyrant]]''', a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]
*[[Tyrant (folklore)|'''Tyrant''']], a figure in [[Kashoonara]] folklore
*'''[[Tyrant rancor]]'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of Universe]]==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Purge – The Tyrant's Fist]]'''''
*'''[[Purge – The Tyrant's Fist 1|''Purge – The Tyrant's Fist'' 1]]'''
*'''[[Purge – The Tyrant's Fist 2|''Purge – The Tyrant's Fist'' 2]]'''
